pages.title: Armour Construction
pages.text: Armour follows the same part-based loop as tools.$(p)$(bold)Base parts$()$(li)Use the slot's Base Pattern at a Leather Station for leather$(li)Use the same pattern at a Smithing Anvil for chainmail$(p)Bring the finished base to the Toolmaker's Station to assemble wearable armour.

pages.title: Metal and Gem Plates
pages.text: $(bold)Plated armour$()$(br)Forge the matching plate as a separate part, then combine base and plate at the Toolmaker's Station.$(p)A hot metal plate can be gem-coated at the Lapidary Table before assembly.$(p)To replace a component, separate the armour at the Toolmaker's Station and assemble it again.
